steps.title: Compute the median from the frequency table
steps.content: Sum the frequencies in the table to find the total number of data values, then locate the middle value. With an odd total, the median is the value at the middle position; with an even total, average the two middle values.

steps.title: Identify the matching choice
steps.content: Working through the frequency table position-by-position, the middle value is 13. That matches choice C — C is correct.
